concept_options.title: Everyone Ships RAG — Nobody Measures It
concept_options.hook: You shipped RAG. You skipped the part where you check if it works.
concept_options.visual_approach: Animated stat cards showing eval adoption rates, then a contrast diagram of 'what teams measure vs what matters'
concept_options.target_audience: ML engineers who already use RAG in production
key_points: Survey: most RAG teams ship without a retrieval eval harness
Chunk size affects quality more than embedding model choice
Hybrid search is becoming the new default in 2026
concept_options.core_message: You can't improve what you don't measure — start with retrieval, not the model.
concept_options.cta: Drop your eval setup in the comments — let's see who's actually measuring.
grounded_in: Most teams ship RAG without any retrieval evaluation harness
Hybrid search improves recall by up to 30% over pure vector search on noisy corpora
concept_options.why_this_works: Contrarian angle backed by survey data hits the underserved gap in the landscape. Strong hook creates cognitive dissonance for builders who know they skipped eval.

concept_options.title: Your Chunk Size Matters More Than Your Embedding Model
concept_options.hook: Teams spend weeks picking embedding models. The real lever is 100 characters away.
concept_options.visual_approach: Side-by-side benchmark charts, ablation study visualization, animated comparison of chunk sizes vs answer quality
key_points: Ablation study: chunk size has larger effect on answer quality than embedding model
Optimal chunk size is domain-dependent — there is no universal default
Small chunks improve precision; large chunks improve recall
concept_options.core_message: Optimize chunking before you benchmark another embedding model.
concept_options.cta: What chunk size are you using? Reply with your use case.
grounded_in: Chunk size has a larger effect on answer quality than embedding model choice
concept_options.why_this_works: Counterintuitive finding backed by primary research. LinkedIn audience of data scientists will share benchmarks. Directly addresses a key audience misconception from the brief.

concept_options.title: Hybrid Search Is Already the New Default — Did You Miss It?
concept_options.hook: Pure vector search is already outdated. The biggest vector DB just made hybrid the default.
concept_options.visual_approach: Timeline animation of vector search evolution, product announcement callout, recall improvement bar chart
concept_options.target_audience: Engineers deciding on retrieval architecture for new projects
key_points: Major vendor shipped hybrid search as default in June 2026
Hybrid search improves recall by 30% over pure vector on noisy corpora
The migration is simpler than most engineers expect
concept_options.core_message: If you're building RAG in 2026, start with hybrid search — not pure vector.
concept_options.cta: Follow for the migration guide next week.
grounded_in: Major vector DB ships hybrid search by default
Hybrid search improves recall by up to 30% over pure vector search on noisy corpora
concept_options.why_this_works: Recency bias drives engagement — a major vendor change this month makes the topic algorithmically timely. Short format fits Instagram's 60-second sweet spot.

selected_concept.rationale: Strongest hook, broadest audience, directly addresses the underserved gap from the research brief. The myth-busting format performs well on YouTube long-form.

tools.role: Drafts structured narration from the proposal concept
tools.why_this_provider: GPT-4o has strong factual accuracy for technical explainers

stages.approach: Write a 90-second script structured as: hook → data reveal → problem framing → practical solution → CTA
stages.fallback_if_unavailable: Write script manually using the proposal concept and research brief

tools.role: Generates scene illustrations for non-data visuals
tools.why_this_provider: FLUX.2 pro produces clean flat-motion-graphics style consistently

stages.approach: Generate 6 scene images via FLUX, render stat cards via Remotion, produce narration via ElevenLabs
stages.fallback_if_unavailable: Use Piper local TTS for narration if ElevenLabs is unavailable

tools.role: Assemble scenes, burn captions, mix audio

stages.approach: Remotion scene-by-scene assembly with word-level caption burn and background music fade
stages.fallback_if_unavailable: Fall back to FFmpeg concat with subtitle burn if Remotion is unavailable

quality_tradeoffs.quality_impact: ElevenLabs produces broadcast-quality narration; Piper is adequate but noticeably robotic

music_source.mood_direction: focused, low-key background — subtle tech ambient

savings_options: Use Piper local TTS to eliminate $0.08 narration cost
Use music_library/ track to eliminate $0.05 music cost
